patterns.name: Recognition Threat
patterns.summary: Competence questioned publicly; you counter-attack to prove the questioner wrong.
detection_cues: Mars in 10H, 1H, or conjunct Sun within 5°
Mangal mahadasha or antardasha active, or Mangal in 10th bhava

loop.stimulus: Your competence is questioned in front of people who matter.
loop.default_script: Counter-attack. Prove the questioner wrong. Escalate volume or precision.
loop.hidden_need: To be seen as capable and respected by this specific audience.
loop.low_consciousness_output: You win the argument and lose the relationship. Status drops anyway.
loop.high_consciousness_route: Pause 7 seconds. Separate the critique from the critic. Ask one clarifying question.
loop.optimal_action: Let me clarify the actual issue before I respond.

body_signature: Heat in the face and chest within two seconds. Jaw and shoulders lock. Breath shortens high in the ribs.
activation_score_inputs: Mars transit to natal Sun, Mars, or 10H ruler (orb under 3°)
Saturn transit squaring or opposing natal Mars
Active Mangal antardasha within a Surya or Shani mahadasha

patterns.name: Control Under Uncertainty
patterns.summary: An unpredictable variable appears; you over-prepare and freeze instead of acting.
detection_cues: Saturn in 1H, 6H, or 10H, or aspecting the Moon
Shani mahadasha active, or Shani in kendra (1, 4, 7, 10) bhavas

loop.stimulus: A plan you depend on develops a variable you cannot predict.
loop.default_script: Over-prepare. Build redundant systems. Demand certainty from people who do not have it.
loop.hidden_need: A felt sense of safety before action is allowed to begin.
loop.low_consciousness_output: Decision paralysis. The window closes while you are still planning.
loop.high_consciousness_route: One breath. Name the smallest reversible action and do only that within 60 seconds.
loop.optimal_action: I will do the next 10-minute step and re-decide after that.

body_signature: Cold tightness in the gut. Eyes narrow, scanning. Hands grip whatever they are near.
activation_score_inputs: Saturn transit to natal Moon, Mercury, or ascendant (orb under 5°)
Stationary Mercury or Mercury retrograde squaring natal Saturn
Shani sade sati or ashtama shani phase active

patterns.name: Solitude Recharge
patterns.summary: A day saturated with input; you push through instead of taking the solitude you need.
detection_cues: Chandra mahadasha or antardasha active, or Chandra in 12th bhava

loop.stimulus: A full day of input — meetings, messages, ambient social demand.
loop.default_script: Push through. Stay available. Treat the need for solitude as weakness.
loop.hidden_need: Unbroken time alone to metabolize input and reset baseline.
loop.low_consciousness_output: You stay reachable, get nothing absorbed, and wake up irritable.
loop.high_consciousness_route: Block 30 minutes. No phone. No music with lyrics. Single window of stillness.
loop.optimal_action: I am offline until 4 — text me only if it is on fire.

body_signature: Heaviness behind the eyes. The skin feels thin. Voices sound louder than they are.
activation_score_inputs: Full Moon or eclipse within 7 days of natal Moon
Chandra antardasha inside a Shani or Rahu mahadasha

patterns.name: Fast Execution / Slow Recovery
patterns.summary: A clear deadline lands; you sprint through, skip recovery, then crash into fog.
detection_cues: Mangal-Budha yoga, or Mangal in upachaya bhavas (3, 6, 10, 11)

loop.stimulus: A clear task with a deadline you respect.
loop.default_script: Sprint to completion. Skip food, sleep, and transition time. Queue the next task immediately.
loop.hidden_need: A nervous system that has actually returned to baseline before the next push.
loop.low_consciousness_output: Three days of brilliance, then a week of foggy underperformance you blame on yourself.
loop.high_consciousness_route: After ship, wait 24 hours before committing to the next sprint. No exceptions.
loop.optimal_action: I shipped. The next decision happens tomorrow, not now.

body_signature: A wired buzz in the limbs after delivery. Sleep is shallow. Appetite is off — either ravenous or absent.
activation_score_inputs: Mars transit conjunct or trine natal Mercury
Jupiter transit to natal Mars (amplifies output, masks fatigue)
Mangal antardasha inside a Budha or Guru mahadasha

patterns.name: Emotional Delayed Processing
patterns.summary: Something lands emotionally; you file it away and the charge misfires days later.
detection_cues: Moon-Mercury hard aspect (square, opposition), or Moon in 8H
Mercury in 12H, or Mercury combust by Sun
Chandra in 8th bhava, or Budha aspected by Shani

loop.stimulus: Something lands emotionally — a comment, a loss, an unexpected kindness.
loop.default_script: File it. Stay functional. Respond with logistics, not feeling.
loop.hidden_need: Time and language to know what you actually feel before you have to perform a reaction.
loop.low_consciousness_output: The feeling surfaces three days later, attached to a wrong target — someone trivial gets the full charge.
loop.high_consciousness_route: Wait 24 hours before any reply that is not strictly logistical. Write the feeling down once.
loop.optimal_action: I will get back to you on this tomorrow — I want to think clearly first.

body_signature: A small delay between hearing words and feeling them. Throat tightens hours later. Dreams get vivid.
activation_score_inputs: Moon transit to natal Mercury or 8H cusp
Chandra antardasha inside a Budha mahadasha, or Shani drishti on natal Chandra
